assignment.name: Sort Suite
assignment.author: lognd
assignment.description: Implement selection sort, insertion sort, and merge sort over a std::vector<int>, plus a stable merge sort over std::vector<std::pair<int,std::string>> keyed on .first, and an is_sorted_asc helper -- all header-only, hand-written from scratch, with merge_sort required to actually run in O(n log n) time rather than just produce the right answer.
